steps.title: Spot the concessive signal
steps.content: The word “while” introduces a concessive clause that notes mass extinctions seem abrupt in geological terms.

steps.title: Match the support-and-qualification logic
steps.content:
The matching choice explains that the clause backs the earlier claim about a sudden CO₂ cause by showing that even an event described as abrupt in geological terms can unfold over thousands or millions of years, making the cause plausible.
The other three either mischaracterize the clause as expanding uncertainty, framing an unresolved question, or merely noting a perspective shift, none of which capture the support‑then‑qualification structure.
C is correct.
